name: zyxel-nr5101-watchdog
description: Watchdog for Zyxel NR5101 gateway connectivity and safe UI reboots

scripts.all-checks: npm run lint && npm run test
scripts.fallow: fallow dead-code --baseline fallow-baselines/dead-code.json --fail-on-issues --quiet && fallow dupes --baseline fallow-baselines/dupes.json --fail-on-issues --quiet && fallow health --baseline fallow-baselines/health.json --report-only --quiet
scripts.fallow:baseline: fallow dead-code --save-baseline fallow-baselines/dead-code.json && fallow dupes --save-baseline fallow-baselines/dupes.json && fallow health --save-baseline fallow-baselines/health.json
scripts.lint: npm run eslint && npm run typecheck && npm run fallow
